name: Fish and Cheese Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1 lb fish fillets, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the fish and set aside.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
3. Bring to a simmer, stirring occasionally.
4. Cook until the chowder thickens and the fish is cooked through.
5. Serve hot and turn off the heat.
